metadata.description: DEV build — local testing of Sprint 6 work before production push. Revert 'name' to 'visionary-marketplace' before committing.

plugins.name: visionary-claude-dev
plugins.description: 202 design styles, 8-step selection algorithm with weighted random, Motion v12 + CSS-first generation, axe-core-instrumented Playwright critique loop, DTCG token export, cross-session taste calibration, multi-variant and consistency-apply commands, background auto-update hook. WCAG 2.2 AA + APCA compliant. 15 frameworks, 20+ languages.
